title: No Enchant Block
description: Decorate your enchanting area with a wider range of blocks. Finally you can freely carpet your floor and still get max level enchantments!
body:
This simple data pack / mod for 1.20+ expands the list of blocks that you can place around your enchanting table without blocking the bookshelves they're next to. In vanilla, this list is currently restricted to only a few things such as ferns and grass.

*Check out the [*gallery*](https://modrinth.com/datapack/no-enchant-block/gallery) for example enchanting area builds you can now create!*

**Included:**

This pack includes  blocks that don't have a full-block hitbox, or have reasonable holes in their textures. Unfortunately, slabs and stairs can't be included because there is no way to determine how they are placed.

**Mod support:**

There is general support for all modded blocks that are included in the default minecraft tags, such as #fences and #all_signs, but blocks that are not part of these tags need to be added individually.

Fully supported mods:
- [Amendments](https://modrinth.com/mod/amendments)
- [Biomes O' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty)
- [Supplementaries](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries)
- [Supplementaries Squared](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries-squared)
- [Quark](https://modrinth.com/mod/quark)

The list will expand as I find time to add more.

---
Also on [Planet Minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/no-enchant-block/)
